text: Right now, I am updating the report.
The team is testing the connection at the moment.
I send a status update every Friday.
Hi Patrícia, can you give me a quick update on the Acme rollout?
Sure. Right now, we are migrating their data, and everything is on track.
Good. Are there any blockers at the moment?
There is one pending item. We are waiting on their security approval.
Okay. What is the priority for this week?
Our priority is user training. I am preparing the sessions now, and I will follow up on Friday.

Hi Patrícia, this is David with a quick update on the Acme project. Right now, the team is migrating the last set of data, and we are on track for Friday. We have reached our first milestone: the test environment is live. There is still one pending item. We are waiting for their security approval, but it is not a blocker yet. Our main priority this week is user training. I am preparing the sessions now, and I will follow up with you tomorrow. Talk soon.

Hi Patrícia, this is Priya from the integration team. I wanted to share a quick progress update before our sync. At the moment, we are testing the new connection, and everything is going well. We are a little behind on the timeline, but the work is still ongoing and nothing is blocked. I am currently writing the documentation, and I will send it to you by the end of the day. Let us follow up on the open items in our next call. Thank you.
